%% Date range helper: prints "Start -- End" or "Start -- present"
\newcommand{\daterange}[2]{%
  \textcolor{muted}{\small #1\ifx&#2&\relax\else{} -- #2\fi}%
}

%% Entry heading macro
%  #1 = bold title   #2 = organisation   #3 = date range   #4 = location
\newcommand{\entryhead}[4]{%
  {\textbf{#1}}\enspace\textcolor{mid}{#2}%
  \hfill\daterange{#3}{#4}%
}

%% Publication entry (hanging indent)
\newenvironment{pubitem}{%
